church.noChurch: You are not a member of a church yet. Ask your church for an invitation link to join.

worship.hint: Invite one person to your service — just the two of you attend the same service.
worship.empty: Create a service first, then invite someone to it:

footer.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Please verify important information.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.subtitle: Key words across every language — Chin/Zo, Burmese and Hebrew from the curated reference, AI-generated entries for the rest. Pick your language above.
vocabulary.loadError: Could not load the vocabulary list.
vocabulary.entryError: Could not generate this entry. Try again shortly.
vocabulary.noWord: No entry for this language yet.
vocabulary.tookTooLong: This is taking longer than usual.

preparing.title: AI Virtual Church
preparing.hint: Take a breath. Your worship will begin soon.

offering.title: Offering
offering.sub: Give as you feel led. Every gift is optional.
offering.thanksDone: Thank you. A PayPal tab has opened to complete your gift. 🙏
offering.thanksSkipped: No worries — you can give any time. 🙏

testimony.title: Testimony
testimony.beFirst: Be the first to share what God has done.
testimony.placeholder: In a sentence or two, what are you grateful for today?
testimony.thanks: Thank you for sharing. Your testimony will appear once reviewed. 🙏
testimony.errMore: Please share a little more (at least 10 characters).
testimony.errSend: Could not send right now. Please try again.

authPanel.registerSub: Register to keep your services, tokens and preferences.
authPanel.regSuccessBody: Please check your email and activate your account before signing in. The activation link expires in 24 hours.
authPanel.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

authReset.forgotSub: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
authReset.newPwSub: Enter your reset token and choose a new password.
authReset.doneSub: You can now sign in with your new password.
authReset.checkInbox: Check your inbox for the reset link.
authReset.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
authReset.resetFailed: Reset failed. The link may have expired.

player.worshipHint: Let the music settle your heart. We'll continue when it ends.
player.beforeYouGoHint: Share what God has done, and give as you feel led.
player.musicUnavailable: Worship music is unavailable right now. We will continue with scripture and prayer.
player.tapToStartAudio: Tap ▶ on the bar to start the audio.
player.tapToStartMusic: Tap ▶ on the bar to start the worship music.
player.errNetwork: Network error while fetching the audio.
player.errDecode: The audio file could not be decoded.
player.errSource: Audio source not supported or unreachable.
player.errMusicNetwork: Network error while fetching the music.
player.errMusicDecode: The music file could not be decoded.
player.errMusicSource: Music source unavailable — the track may have expired.
player.errMusicGeneric: The worship music failed to play.

history.tapToRestore: Tap a session to restore it.
history.noSessions: No sessions yet. Start a Bible Study, Worship, or Pastor Chat.
history.noTranscript: This session has no chat transcript.
history.deleteConfirm: Delete this session? You can restore it later.
history.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {n} session(s)? You can restore them later.
history.bulkPurgeConfirm: Permanently delete {n} session(s)? This cannot be undone.
history.journalStarted: Writing your journal entry… find it under 📊 My Journey.

account.title: My Account
account.goalsPlaceholder: What are you seeking in this season?
account.aiMemory: Allow AI to reference my past sessions ("Last week we studied…")
account.noUpgrade: Premium upgrades are not available right now.
account.pwTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.

bible.title: Online Bible
bible.subtitle: Read Scripture in English (King James Version & Berean Standard Bible, 2020), Hebrew (Westminster Leningrad Codex — Tanakh), Burmese (Judson, 1835) and the Chin/Zo languages (Falam, Hakha, Mara, Matu, Mizo, Paite, Sizang, Tedim) — public-domain translations.
bible.copyFailed: Copy failed — long-press to select instead

errors.loadBible: Could not load the Bible. Please try again.

study.title: AI Bible Study
study.setupSub: Sit with experienced pastors. Ask anything. Study together.
study.planAllows: Your plan allows up to {max} pastor | Your plan allows up to {max} pastors
study.questionPlaceholder: e.g. What does John 3:16 mean for me?

msg.notAvailable: Bible Study is not available right now.
msg.openFailed: Could not open that study session.
msg.filtered: A response was filtered for safety.
msg.narrationUnavailable: Narration is not available right now.
msg.shareCopied: Copied — paste it anywhere to share.
msg.shareUnsupported: Sharing not supported on this device.
msg.emailPrompt: Send the summary to which email address?
msg.pdfMobileHint: Tap ••• and choose "Open in browser" to save the PDF.
msg.pdfFailed: Could not export the PDF — try opening this page in your browser.

pastor.title: AI Pastor Chat
pastor.subtitle: A caring, Scripture-grounded companion. Your conversation is saved to your journal.
pastor.empty: Share what's on your heart. The pastor is listening. 🙏
pastor.reachError: Could not reach the pastor right now.

worship.title: Worship Radio
worship.subtitle: Discover uplifting worship songs
worship.noEmbed: No in-app player link for this track yet.

errors.pickMood: Pick a mood or describe how you feel.
errors.noMatch: No songs matched yet — try another mood.
errors.buildFailed: Could not build a playlist. Please try again.

fathersDay.notAvailableBody: This special-day video maker isn't open at the moment. Please check back later.
fathersDay.clipLen: Clip length: {len}s — play, then mark where your part starts and ends.
fathersDay.photoLimits: JPG / PNG / WEBP · up to {max} photos · 8 MB each
fathersDay.cropHint: Drag and pinch/scroll to frame your father. The video is vertical, so this keeps the part you want.
fathersDay.savedHint: Saved to your gallery. To post it as ONE video on Facebook: Create post → Photo/Video (not Stories/Reels) → pick this video → Post.
fathersDay.linkNote: A link shows a preview card that opens the video on tap (not a native upload). The link works for 30 days, then expires — for a permanent post, Save the video and upload it.
fathersDay.footPrivacy: Your photos are used only to make this video and are removed after.
fathersDay.linkCopiedPaste: Link copied — paste it to share.
fathersDay.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

stickers.title: Live Sticker Maker
stickers.subtitle: Upload a photo — we'll turn it into a fun art sticker.
stickers.disabled: This feature isn't available right now. Please check back soon.
stickers.photoHint: Any photo works — vertical or horizontal. JPG / PNG / WebP.
stickers.step1: 1 · Adjust the square (we centred it on the face)
stickers.autoCorrect: We'll auto-correct spelling for English text.
stickers.keepNote: Share or Save posts the actual image to your phone and apps (WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, Viber, X…) — it becomes yours to keep, forever, just like any photo you upload. It stays even if this site goes away.
stickers.linkNote: A link shows a preview from our site. The link works for 1 year, then expires. To keep your sticker permanently, use Share or Save above.
stickers.errStart: Could not start the sticker maker.
stickers.savedShare: Saved the image — attach it in your app to share.
stickers.shareMenuFailed: Couldn't open the share menu — the image was downloaded instead.
